scenarios.title: Browser shows “Not Secure” warning
scenarios.data_search: help desk browser shows not secure warning sign in access browser shows not secure warning your browser is showing a security warning or not secure banner when you reach the rapidreconciler url this is almost always one of two things a stale connection your browser is holding from before the certificate was renewed or a genuine certificate problem on the gsi side the first three steps below take a minute and resolve the typical case you only need it for step 4 what you re seeing the browser displays not secure in the address bar or a full warning page your connection isn t private before the login page loads the error code below the message is usually net err cert date invalid net err cert authority invalid or similar common phrasings the site says it s not secure there s a certificate warning or the lock icon is missing edge cert warning red not secure badge step 1 close edge completely and reopen most cert warnings right after a renewal are caused by edge holding an open connection from before the new cert was deployed a clean restart of edge resolves the typical case close every edge window not just the affected tab reopen edge from the taskbar or start menu visit the rapidreconciler url again warning gone stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 hard reload the page force the browser to fetch the page and the certificate fresh with the warning page open press shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac warning gone stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 try the url in inprivate or a different browser this is the diagnostic that tells you which side the problem is on inprivate uses a fresh session with no cached connections no cookies no extensions and a different browser uses an entirely separate certificate trust store press ctrl shift n to open an inprivate window in edge or open chrome firefox if you have it visit the same url while you re here click the red not secure badge in the address bar to see the certificate details note the valid to date you ll include it in the support email if you need to escalate read the result warning gone in inprivate or a different browser it s a stale local cache continue to step 4 or have it do it still warning in inprivate or a different browser the certificate is genuinely broken on the gsi side skip step 4 and email rr support directly using the block below worked in inprivate continue to step 4 still warning everywhere skip to the escalation block below step 4 below is for your it if step 3 confirmed the warning is local works in inprivate fails in normal edge the next step is workstation level cache clearing that needs it click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 4 hand off to it for your it when this applies steps 1 3 didn t resolve it but the url works in inprivate or a different browser that means the cert is renewed on the server and the workstation is holding stale state two paths for it to try in order clear the workstation s cached cert ssl state standard browser network state flush windows ssl state reset via internet options and if needed a sweep of the windows cert store and a full edge restart verify the renewed cert is actually live if the workstation cleanup doesn t resolve it the new cert may not be deployed yet or a cdn load balancer or reverse proxy in front of the site may still be serving the old one padlock shows the new cert stop here otherwise escalate to rr support with what was tried still not resolved email rapidreconciler support if step 3 showed the warning in every browser including inprivate or step 4 didn t clear it the certificate is genuinely broken on the gsi side and only gsi can fix it email rrsupport getgsi com with a screenshot of the warning page or the certificate details panel the exact rapidreconciler url you re using the error code shown e g net err cert date invalid the valid to date you noted in step 3 if you got that far whether the warning also appeared in inprivate or a different browser this tells support whether the problem is local or server side whether all users at your site are affected or just one email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: No data visible after logging in
scenarios.data_search: help desk no data visible after logging in blank or missing data no data visible after logging in you can sign in but the page is blank or shows no figures the cause is almost always something on your network browser or vpn the steps below resolve most cases without contacting support what you re seeing you log in successfully but the reconciliation inventory or other pages are empty the screen shows i see no data the page is blank or everything is empty it started suddenly with no apparent change on your end it affects multiple users at the same time or the opposite only you while coworkers are unaffected common phrasings blank screen on my laptop works for everyone else but me logs in fine on a different computer quick triage first ask is it just you or are coworkers seeing it too the answer changes which steps below are most likely to help only you or only this machine try logging in on a different computer a coworker s your own home machine or a phone tethered laptop or have a coworker try the same page on theirs if rr works elsewhere the issue is isolated to your laptop steps 2 3 are most likely to help plus step 4 asking it to look at this specific machine multiple users at once this is more likely a network or company side change than your machine step 1 vpn and step 4 asking it about recent web filter dns or firewall changes are the high value picks try these steps in order step 1 confirm you re on vpn or the corporate network when this applies you re working remotely from home while travelling or off site rapidreconciler is only reachable from your corporate network or via your organization s vpn if you re disconnected login can succeed but no data will flow if you re working remotely confirm you re connected to your organization s vpn or approved remote access method if you believe you re connected disconnect and reconnect the vpn then hard refresh the browser resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 hard reload the browser when this applies you re confirmed on the corporate network or vpn a stale browser cache or a partially failed initial page load is the most common simple cause press shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac if that doesn t resolve it fully close all browser windows reopen and log in again resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 allow local network access in your browser when this applies your browser was recently updated or this is a new workstation edge and chrome have a permission gate that controls whether sites can connect to local network devices if rapidreconciler isn t on the allowed list all data calls silently fail in edge open settings privacy search and services site permissions all permissions local network access under allowed to connect to any device on your local network verify rapidreconciler getgsi com is present if it s missing click add site and add it hard reload the page and check whether data appears chrome has the equivalent setting under its site permissions area edge settings privacy search and services site permissions all permissions local network access rapidreconciler getgsi com should appear under allowed to connect to any device on your local network if you can t find or change the setting on your machine ask your it department to adjust it resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 4 step 4 check with your it for recent network security or local machine changes when this applies the issue started suddenly multiple users are affected at the same time or steps 1 3 didn t fix a single user single machine issue if multiple users are hit at once a new web filter dns filter secure web gateway or endpoint security policy is the most common cause ask your it contact has anything been turned on updated or changed recently for web filtering dns filtering secure web gateways or endpoint security common products cisco umbrella zscaler cloudflare gateway forcepoint palo alto prisma fortinet sonicwall crowdstrike sentinelone microsoft defender was there a windows update a new vpn client or a switch from split tunnel to full tunnel vpn are other getgsi com domains also blocked e g a related gsi sharepoint site if yes the web filter rule is scoped broader than just rr then run a quick cross network test try rapidreconciler from a different network a mobile hotspot is fine if it works from a different network the issue is on your corporate network ask your it to whitelist rapidreconciler getgsi com on whichever product they identified then hard refresh the browser if only you are affected and rr worked on a different computer the issue is isolated to your laptop ask your it to check local firewall on the affected workstation browser policy or windows group policy that might restrict site permissions or local network access dns settings on this specific machine custom dns server hosts file browser dns over https whether this workstation has a different security profile from coworkers newer endpoint agent isolated vlan etc resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved email rapidreconciler support send an email to rrsupport getgsi com with as much of the following as you can which steps above you tried and what happened on each whether one user is affected or multiple and roughly when it started whether the issue follows the user works on a different machine on the same network or follows the network fails on the same machine when on a different network if your it investigated what they found and what they ruled out email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: RapidReconciler URL won’t load
scenarios.data_search: help desk rapidreconciler url won t load sign in access for your it rapidreconciler url won t load the page won t load at all you see this site can t be reached or dns_probe_finished_nxdomain instead of the login page this means the url itself can t be resolved the fix usually requires gsi to update a dns record but a couple of quick checks confirm the url you re using before you contact support what you re seeing the browser returns dns_probe_finished_nxdomain this site can t be reached or a similar resolution failure the login page never appears the request fails before any rapidreconciler content loads common phrasings the page won t load site can t be reached the url is broken try these steps in order all steps below are for your it this scenario is fully it side click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled ready to forward to your it department or dba generate it email step 1 confirm the url you re using before anything else check that you re using the url gsi gave you for rapidreconciler not a stale bookmark from a previous server compare the url in the address bar against the url on your most recent gsi documentation or onboarding email try typing the url directly rather than using a saved bookmark confirm spelling especially if the url contains your customer code or business unit resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 test from a different network this single test tells you whether the url is broken everywhere or only on your corporate network from the same machine try the url on a different network a mobile hotspot is fine note whether it works fails the same way or returns a different error read the result works on a different network your corporate network is blocking or filtering the url ask your it to check dns filtering web filtering and firewall rules for getgsi com fails on a different network too the issue is on the gsi side the dns record likely needs attention continue below to email rr support resolved by your it stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved email rapidreconciler support if the cross network test confirmed it s gsi side email rrsupport getgsi com with the exact url you re trying to reach the exact error wording the browser shows or a screenshot the cross network test result from step 2 whether all users at your site are affected or just one email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: Excel export failures
scenarios.data_search: help desk excel export failures daily jobs exports excel export failures you click export or download on a report and nothing happens no file no error message the rapidreconciler service has usually drifted into a state where the export call silently fails clicking the in ui restart service button resets it and the export works again what you re seeing you click export to excel or the download button on a report and nothing happens no file is generated and no error is displayed the export worked normally before then stopped working often after the next session the next day or after an idle period common phrasings the export button does nothing excel download isn t working i can t download my report clicking export gives no response try these steps in order step 1 click the restart service button in the rapidreconciler ui when this applies you have authorization to see and click the button the restart service button resets the rr service state without anyone touching the server after the restart the export should work again immediately locate the restart service button in the rr ui and click it wait for the restart to complete retry the export on the same report the restart service button sits in the left navigation panel below import jde data resolved stop here otherwise continue step 2 ask your rr administrator if you don t see the button when this applies the restart service button isn t visible to you the button isn t visible to all users if you don t see it you don t have the authorization for it contact your rr administrator a power user within your organization ask them to either click restart service themselves or grant you access to that function after the restart retry the export resolved stop here otherwise continue step 3 confirm the fix and check a second report retry the report that originally failed try one or two other reports to confirm exports are working broadly not just for the one you tried first all exports working done if failures recur later continue to step 4 step 4 if it keeps recurring capture the pattern one restart isn t a problem a pattern of needing it daily or weekly is and the pattern itself is the diagnostic clue support needs note the time since the last restart service track how often the issue recurs next day every few days after long idle etc note whether other users at your site hit the same thing at the same time if the workaround is becoming a regular ritual the deeper fix is a full application server reboot scheduled by your it continue to step 5 pattern captured and recurring continue to step 5 otherwise continue below to email rr support step 5 ask your it for a full application server reboot for your it when this applies the restart service workaround from steps 1 3 only lasts about 24 hours and the export keeps failing the pattern from step 4 means the underlying service is in a bad state that a full server reboot will clear whereas a service only restart only resets it briefly the daily service restart is treating the symptom a full reboot should clear the underlying state and give a more durable fix ask your it to schedule a brief outage on the rapidreconciler application server off hours is best have them perform a full reboot of the server not just a service restart after the reboot monitor the next two end of day exports to confirm they complete normally stable for 48 hours resolved you can stop the daily service restarts otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved email rapidreconciler support email rrsupport getgsi com if any of the following apply the restart service button doesn t fix it the issue is recurring frequently daily or near daily multiple users at your site report the same behavior new symptoms appear error messages partial downloads or general instability include the recurrence pattern from step 4 time since last restart frequency scope the reports you tried one that failed plus one that worked if any a screenshot of the page where you click export if useful email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: Inventory validation light is red
scenarios.data_search: help desk inventory validation light is red status lights red inventory validation light is red the inventory validation indicator in the page header is red what this light checks depends on the module you re in inventory and transfers the prior period s ending variance must equal the current period s carry forward on both the gl balance and the variance carry forward po receipts only that the gl balance rolls forward correctly the light is binary red or green never amber and no other message accompanies the colour change the most common cause is unposted gl batches in the prior period most cases resolve once those batches are posted in jde don t start your month end close until both status lights are green what you re seeing the inventory validation indicator in the page header is red common phrasings the red light came on this just popped up or we have a x variance for period the page header the left hand inventory validation dot is red while system status remains green try these steps in order step 1 check jde for unposted gl batches in the prior period when this applies always check this first it resolves roughly 80 of cases hover the red inventory validation indicator if you want the tooltip recap the most common cause is unposted gl batches in the prior period this is a check inside your jde erp not rapidreconciler in jde look for any unposted gl batches in the prior period for the affected account if you find unposted batches post them refresh the page in rapidreconciler and check whether the indicator goes green resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 2 step 2 open the inventory validation report when this applies all prior period batches are confirmed posted but the indicator is still red click the red inventory validation indicator rapidreconciler exports an excel report of the period by period roll forward calculation save the file you ll read from it directly to decide what to do next the inventory validation report each row is summary data for one account in one period multiple periods per account stack vertically and multiple accounts can appear one after another filters on the page determine which accounts and periods are included the glok column tells you whether each period s ending gl balance rolled forward into the next period it takes one of four values baseline the earliest period in the data for that account nothing to compare against yes the prior period s ending balance carried forward correctly no the carry forward failed this is the row you act on end the most current period in the data for that account the varok column applies the same yes no to the variance carry forward if glok is no varok will also be no the gl failure cascades got the excel continue to step 3 to read the result step 3 decide based on what the report shows find the row s where glok no or varok no and follow the matching path what the row shows what to do glok no with a non zero amount in the unpostbatch column for the prior period post the unposted batches in jde then refresh the page glok no but unpostbatch is zero on every row run the jde account repost program for the affected account and watch for errors fix any errors if the program completes cleanly and the light is still red email the excel to rrsupport getgsi com varok no while glok yes an administrator opens the company in companies configuration and uses the reroll by company function resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved email rapidreconciler support email rrsupport getgsi com if the report shows glok no with no unposted batches and the jde account repost finished without errors or if reroll by company didn t clear a varok no row include the inventory validation report excel from step 2 the most important attachment confirmation of which path you walked batches posted repost run cleanly or reroll attempted anything unusual you can think of backdated transactions recent erp changes etc email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: Login fails with a “connect timeout” error
scenarios.data_search: help desk login fails with a connect timeout error sign in access login fails with a connect timeout error the login page loads but submitting credentials fails with a connect timeout banner the two minute test below tells you whether the issue is on your network or on the gsi side that s the most useful information you can send to support what you re seeing you can t sign in to rapidreconciler the page loads but the login attempt fails the error banner mentions a connect timeout against an azure backend host often something ending in cloudapp net common phrasings i can t logon the login page won t accept my credentials or connection to backend timed out try these steps in order step 1 capture the exact error the exact error wording matters it tells support which backend is timing out take a screenshot of the login error banner note the backend hostname shown in the error often something like gsi backend cloudapp net captured continue to step 2 step 2 try from a different network cross network test this is the single highest value test it takes about two minutes and tells you which side owns the problem from the same machine switch off your corporate network the easiest way is to tether to your phone s mobile hotspot try to log in to rapidreconciler again read the result works on a different network the issue is on your corporate network ask your it to check whether anything is blocking the azure backend hostname firewall web filter dns filter fails on a different network too the issue is on the gsi side there s nothing more you can do locally continue below to email rr support resolved by your it stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved email rapidreconciler support if the cross network test failed login fails from a different network too or if your it has confirmed nothing on their side is blocking the backend email rrsupport getgsi com with the screenshot of the login error banner from step 1 the backend hostname shown in the error the cross network test result from step 2 works fails not tested and which different network you used what time you first noticed the failure and whether other users at your site are also affected don t keep retrying once you ve confirmed it fails from a different network too the issue isn t on your end and retrying doesn t help email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: RR nightly job has been running for hours / hasn’t completed
scenarios.data_search: help desk rr nightly job running long job won t finish for your it rr nightly job has been running for hours hasn t completed the nightly rapidreconciler job has been running far longer than it usually does sometimes 4 hours sometimes still going at the start of business and it hasn t completed there s no error message and the system status indicator may still show running rather than red today s figures aren t available because the refresh never finished this almost always means the sql server side got stuck on something a long running transaction a blocked session a runaway log growth not a problem with rapidreconciler itself the fix is for your it to stop the running sql job let it roll back and re run it most of the time that clears it different symptom if the system status indicator is red and the job has clearly failed not just hung see system status light is red instead that path covers the post failure environment checks disk tempdb ssis errors what you re seeing the rr nightly job started at its usual time but is still running hours later no error has been raised the system status indicator may show running amber or just data is older than usual the reconciliation page shows yesterday s data or older today s figures aren t available yet common phrasings rr is running long the nightly didn t finish data isn t updating the job s been going since last night recommendations to share with your it step 1 capture the basic context note the following before forwarding to your it the job s normal completion time vs how long it s been running today the date the last successful refresh completed so you know how stale today s figures are whether the system status indicator is amber red or shows running captured forward to your it with steps 2 3 to walk hand off to your it the remaining checks need to be performed by your it department or dba click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 2 for your it stop the running sql job and let it roll back this is the standard fix and it resolves most cases have it do the following on the rapidreconciler database server open sql server management studio sql server agent job activity monitor find the running rapidreconciler job the one that hasn t completed right click stop job wait for the job to finish rolling back don t kill the sql server process or restart the service while a transaction is rolling back let it complete cleanly rollback can take a while sometimes as long as the original run that s normal once job activity monitor shows the job is no longer running re start the job manually right click start job at step first step most of the time the re run completes in its usual time and today s figures appear once it finishes re run completed cleanly stop here you re done job hangs again or rollback never completes continue to step 3 step 3 for your it if it hangs again investigate what s blocking it if the job hangs at the same point on the re run something on the sql server side is consistently blocking it have it check in this order activity monitor active expensive queries and processes while the job is running look for the rr session and check what it s blocked on look at the blocked by column long running transactions or open transactions on tempdb run dbcc opentran on the rapidreconciler database and on tempdb to see if anything s holding locks tempdb log file size and autogrowth a tempdb log that s near full will stall any large operation same goes for the database s own log file rapidreconciler_prod_log ldf free space if needed free disk space on every drive hosting the database the data and log directories and tempdb low free space stalls the job silently recent sql server changes sql patches service account changes antivirus or backup software added log shipping or replication enabled anything that changed since the last successful run is suspect if it identifies and fixes the underlying issue kill the blocking session expand the log free disk space have them re run the job from step 2 issue identified and resolved by it stop here still hangs after the checks above continue below to rr support if your it can t resolve it email rapidreconciler support send what your it found if the job consistently hangs and the sql server side checks don t point at a fixable cause email rrsupport getgsi com and include the job s normal vs actual run duration and the date of the last successful completion what your it saw in activity monitor which step the job was on what session it was blocked by if anything how long it ran before being stopped the sql agent job history error or warning messages if any what your it already checked and ruled out disk tempdb log space recent sql server changes whether the issue is a one off or recurring e g hangs every monday but not other days is a useful pattern email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: Data looks old and isn’t refreshing
scenarios.data_search: help desk data looks old and isn t refreshing stale or wrong data data looks old and isn t refreshing figures in rapidreconciler are showing yesterday s or older numbers and aren t updating rapidreconciler refreshes from jde on a nightly cadence so the first question is simply whether the refresh window has closed yet if it has and the data is still stale the scheduled refresh job on your database server has likely stopped or is failing that fix requires your it or dba what you re seeing rapidreconciler is showing yesterday s or older figures rather than current data you expect a daily or scheduled refresh that hasn t happened other parts of rapidreconciler load and look healthy only the data is old try these steps in order step 1 confirm the nightly refresh window has closed and the data really is stale rapidreconciler imports from jde on a nightly cadence if you re looking before the refresh has run for the day the figures will reflect yesterday s state that s expected not a problem verify the refresh is overdue before assuming something s broken hover the status indicators in the page header the tooltip shows the refresh time there is no separate timestamp printed on the page compare that timestamp against your customer s expected refresh window if it s from after last night s window today s data is in hard reload the page shift f5 on windows cmd shift r on mac to make sure you re not looking at a cached older version refresh overdue and figures genuinely stale continue to step 2 otherwise stop here this is normal pre refresh behavior hand off to your it the remaining checks need to be performed by your it department or dba click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 2 for your it ask your it or dba to check the sql agent job the refresh runs through a sql agent job on your database server if that s stopped disabled or failing data won t flow forward this to your it or dba confirm the sql server agent service is running on the database server and set to start automatically in ssms expand sql server agent jobs and confirm the rapidreconciler job is enabled right click the job view history check the last several runs succeeding failing or not running at all if a recent run failed expand it and read the step level error message if the job is healthy but data is still stale run it manually start job at step and watch it complete resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved email rapidreconciler support if your it dba confirms the sql agent job is healthy but data is still stale email rrsupport getgsi com with the timestamp the data is stuck at and what timestamp you expected to see what your it dba found when checking the sql agent job job state last run result any error messages a screenshot showing the stale figures with the company business unit visible email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: System status light is red
scenarios.data_search: help desk system status light is red status lights red for your it system status light is red the system status indicator reflects the health of the sql agent job that loads rapidreconciler it appears in the page header on every module the colour is the same wherever you look red means the job didn t complete cleanly so today s figures aren t reliable don t start your month end close until both status lights are green most red lights are caused by something in the sql server ssis environment your it owns out of disk a full tempdb log a failed sql agent job step or an ssis package error have your it walk the checks below before involving rr support many issues clear once the underlying environment is healthy and the job re runs different symptom if the nightly job is still running rather than failed no error just hasn t finished after many hours see rr nightly job running long that path covers stopping the hung sql job and re running it what you re seeing the system status indicator in the page header has turned red the colour is the same on every module it reflects the sql agent job not the page you re on common phrasings system status is red the red light is on the job failed or something crashed reports or scheduled processing didn t complete the way they normally do the page header the right hand system status dot is red while inventory validation remains green recommendations to share with your it step 1 take a screenshot and send it to it take a screenshot of the page header showing the red system status indicator the light is the same on every module so any page works date time company and business unit don t matter for this issue forward the screenshot to your it department or dba the button below drafts an email with the it side checks steps 2 4 pre filled so they have a starting checklist sent use the button below to forward the it checks hand off to your it the remaining checks need to be performed by your it department or dba click to draft an email with the steps below pre filled generate it email step 2 for your it check disk space and tempdb on the database server the most common cause is the sql server host running out of room have it check free disk space on every drive that hosts the rapidreconciler database the sql server data and log directories and tempdb low or zero free space stalls the nightly job tempdb log file size and autogrowth a full tempdb log will fail any large operation if it s near full free space shrink restart the sql service during a maintenance window or expand the drive before re running database log file rapidreconciler_prod_log ldf same check same fix path disk and log space ok continue to step 3 step 3 for your it review sql agent job history for the failed job have it open sql server management studio sql server agent job activity monitor or the job history node on the rapidreconciler database server find the most recent failed rapidreconciler job that lines up with the red light s timestamp open the job s history and read the error message on the failed step common patterns out of disk login failure deadlock package validation error capture the error text that s the most useful artifact if this needs to escalate to rr support found the failed job and captured the error continue to step 4 step 4 for your it pull the integration services ssis report if the failed job was an ssis package the ssis catalog has a more detailed execution report than the sql agent log alone in ssms expand integration services catalogs ssisdb your folder right click the project or package reports standard reports all executions find the failed execution at the timestamp matching the red light open view messages on that execution capture the error messages especially anything labeled error or onerror if it identifies and fixes the underlying issue cleared disk expanded log fixed permissions have them re run the job the status light should clear once the next successful run completes issue identified and resolved by it stop here you re done issue still unclear or not resolved continue below to rr support if your it can t resolve it email rapidreconciler support send the crash details and what your it found if the sql agent ssis errors don t point at an environment cause it can fix the click and export path captures the rr side picture for support email rrsupport getgsi com and include click the red system status indicator on the page header it exports an excel with the crash details the most useful attachment for rr support the sql agent error message and ssis execution messages your it captured in steps 3 and 4 what your it already checked and ruled out disk tempdb log space email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk

scenarios.title: User can’t see newly granted companies
scenarios.data_search: help desk user can t see newly granted companies blank or missing data user can t see newly granted companies your admin granted you access to additional companies but you don t see them in the company selector your browser session is holding the old narrower permission set a widget refresh or a fresh login almost always fixes it what you re seeing your admin granted you access to one or more companies but when you click into a tab reconciliation inventory etc you see no companies in the company selector your account is active and your admin confirms your access is saved correctly common phrasings i can t see my new company my newly granted companies aren t showing the company dropdown is missing options i should have try these steps in order step 1 ask your admin to confirm your access was saved correctly when this applies always check this first it s the simplest cause if the authorized companies dialog was closed with the x instead of save the changes can be silently dropped the admin thinks they saved your access but the change didn t persist ask your admin to verify open admin users and click the edit pencil icon for your account confirm the right companies are ticked under the column that matches the tab you re trying to use reconciliation has its own column inventory has its own etc if any boxes are unticked tick them and click save not the x saved correctly continue to step 2 step 2 refresh the company selector widget your session is most likely holding the old permission set the widget has a refresh that pulls the latest security from the server on the page you re on click the refresh icon in the top right corner of the company selector widget filter area check whether the missing companies appear resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 3 step 3 log out and back in a fresh login pulls the current security settings from the server and bypasses anything the browser cached for the previous session log out of rapidreconciler completely log back in open the affected tab and check the company selector again resolved stop here otherwise continue to step 4 step 4 hard refresh the browser then log in again this clears any cached page assets that might still be holding old permissions on the affected page press shift f5 on windows or cmd shift r on mac log in again and check the company selector if you still see no companies ask your admin to re open your user record one more time to verify the boxes are still checked closing the dialog with x instead of save can drop the changes silently resolved stop here otherwise continue below to email rr support still not resolved email rapidreconciler support if a clean re login still doesn t surface the companies the issue is more likely on the back end than session caching email rrsupport getgsi com with a screenshot of your authorized companies dialog as your admin sees it with the boxes ticked and saved a screenshot of what you see on the affected tab your name and the tab you re trying to use confirmation that you ve logged out and back in since the access was granted email rrsupport getgsi com back to help desk
